calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Suknandan Persaud, Aka Suknandan Persand, As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF VICENTE MARTINEZ' Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Suknandan Persaud, Aka Suknandan Persand, As Judgment Debtor IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
